channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: These free ChatGPT apps will analyze data, copyedit text, and improve productivity
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. To use ChatGPT more creatively, you can now pick from thousands of free apps called “GPTs.” Each AI app has a special super power.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: New Samsung Galaxy Ring leak shows its health-tracking features in action
item.description: The Samsung Health app for Android has revealed some of the capabilities coming with the Galaxy Ring.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: InfoWorld Technology of the Year Awards 2024 Nominations Now Open
item.description: The 2024 InfoWorld Technology of the Year Awards will recognize the best and most innovative products across 26 categories in software development, cloud computing, data analytics, and AI and machine learning. Nominations for the 2024 awards are now open.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 7 steps to improve analytics for data-driven organizations
item.description: When leaders say they want to be a data-driven organization, a key objective is empowering business people to use data, predictive models, generative AI capabilities, and data visualizations to improve decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Morgan Stanley Unveils AI-Powered Global Analysis Tool for Financial Advisors
item.description: Morgan Stanley's newly launched AI-generated analysis tools for financial advisors aim to boost efficiency by leveraging note-taking capabilities, revolutionizing the way advisors analyze global markets.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Ibercaja Acquires Orange Bank España's Technological Platform to Boost Consumer Financing
item.description: Ibercaja has acquired Orange Bank España's technological platform to drive transformation and growth in its consumer financing business, enhancing its digital capabilities and expanding its market presence.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Morgan Stanley’s gen AI launch is about global analysis
item.description: When Morgan Stanley announced its new generative AI support tools for financial advisors last week, it talked about gaining efficiencies from its notetaking abilities. But those who track the $54 billion financial firm said that its goal is much larger.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Sony Walkman turns 45 – here's why it's still the most iconic gadget of all time
item.description: Sony’s famous Walkman is the same age as Kourtney Kardashian, Chris Pratt, and Pink, but its legacy is bigger than all three put together.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Abandoning doggy doo? DNA will sniff you out and expose you
item.description: Some apartment complexes and homeowners associations are requiring residents to submit DNA samples from their dogs to track who is responsible for piles of dog waste.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China's Moon Exploration Efforts Spark Concerns of Potential Military Intentions
item.description: NASA Administrator Bill Nelson suggests that China's space program, which includes lunar exploration, has military implications, sparking concerns about potential land grabs on the moon.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: TSA launches 3D scanners to detect explosives
item.description: The new technology will give agents a 3D image that can be turned 360 degrees for enhanced threat protection.
item.dc:creator: Urja Sinha, NewsNation

item.title: Video assistant referees to smart rings: Here’s the soccer tech at Euro 2024
item.description: From smart-enabled match balls and artificial intelligence to cryogenic recovery chambers, soccer is being transformed by the cutting-edge technology available to players, coaches and officials.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: FCC proposes rule requiring carriers to unlock all cellphones
item.description: The FCC wants carriers to unlock cellphones within 60 days of purchase so users can shop different networks.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, The Hill

item.title: Heartless scammers are preying on people's lost pet anguish
item.description: In a new "lost pet" scheme, scammers take advantage of upset pet owners searching for their lost companions in an attempt to get money through deception.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Opinion: Big tech companies are burning through reservoirs of trust with AI
item.description: Is generative AI a useful productivity tool or a series of overhyped, intrusive products that consume vital resources?
item.dc:creator: Irina Raicu, The Mercury News

item.title: The Supreme Court nears the end of another momentous term. A decision on Trump's immunity looms
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In the last 10 days of June, on a frenetic pace of its own making, the Supreme Court touched a wide swath of American society in a torrent of decisions on abortion, guns, the environment, health, the opioid crisis, securities fraud and homelessness.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: States Prepare Workers for AI Era with Upgrading Tech Skills
item.description: As generative artificial intelligence gains popularity in workplaces, states are taking steps to ensure workers stay ahead of the curve by developing skills that complement AI capabilities and prevent job displacement.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon is reviewing whether Perplexity AI improperly scraped online content
item.description: Amazon is reviewing claims that the artificial intelligence startup Perplexity AI is scraping content — including from prominent news sites — without approval.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Photos: Tech exec’s Pescadero mansion listed for $8 million
item.description: Features of the 6,000-square-foot mansion include a two-story solarium and an indoor swimming pool with underwater channel to the outdoor lap pool.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Navigating the future of healthcare: Transformation, measurement and integration
item.description: How will healthcare continue to transform? The post Navigating the future of healthcare: Transformation, measurement and integration first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: With new AI tools available, State Department encourages experimentation
item.description: State wants employees to try out new AI tools like State Chat and North Star, but also share their own use cases to help drive the agency's AI approach. The post With new AI tools available, State Department encourages experimentation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: White House to hold conference for digital creators
item.description: The Biden administration will host digital creators at the White House for the first-ever Creator Economy Conference in August, the director of digital strategy announced Friday. The conference, which will be held Aug.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google opens access to 2 million context window of Gemini 1.5 Pro
item.description: Google has opened access to the 2-million-token context window of the Gemini 1.5 Pro AI model. The company also is giving developers access to code execution capabilities in the Gemini API and making the Gemma 2 model available in Google AI Studio. These announcements were made on June 27.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: European Union's competition boss signals fresh AI scrutiny for Microsoft-OpenAI deal and Google
item.description: The European Union is escalating its scrutiny of the artificial intelligence industry, including taking a fresh look into Microsoft’s multibillion-dollar partnership with OpenAI.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: EU commissioner slams Apple Intelligence delay
item.description: If you believe European Commission Vice President Margrethe Vestager, Apple’s decision to delay introduction of its Apple Intelligence AI is a “stunning declaration” of its own anticompetitive behavior.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Ultimate Guide: Best Android Smartphones for Business
item.description: As Android continues to reign supreme in global smartphone usage, businesses worldwide are increasingly adopting these devices for employee use. This comprehensive guide helps you make an informed decision when choosing the best Android smartphones for your business needs.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Box announces upgrade to Box AI, integration with GPT-4o
item.description: Box has unveiled a new set of features in Box AI that includes an integration with GPT-4o, support for image and spreadsheet files and the Box AI for Metadata API.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Doxxing victims in California may gain right to sue to ‘bring some power back’
item.description: A state bill would allow doxxing victims to sue those responsible in civil court for as much as $30,000, plus attorneys’ fees and court costs. Supporters say it’s needed to stem online harassment against LGBTQ residents and others.
item.dc:creator: CalMatters, The Mercury News

item.title: Busting AI Hype: Separating Fact from Fiction
item.description: The line between AI reality and perception is blurred. Is the success of AI mostly hype, or are there genuine achievements being overlooked? As enterprises navigate AI adoption, it's crucial to separate fact from fiction.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Supreme Court rules for Biden administration in a social media dispute with conservative states
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Wednesday sided with the Biden administration in a dispute with Republican-led states over how far the federal government can go to combat controversial social media posts on topics including COVID-19 and election security.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Broadcom bolsters VMware Edge Compute Stack
item.description: A slew of updates in VMware Edge Compute Stack (ECS) 3.5 are aimed at helping customers more easily manage edge devices, applications, and infrastructure across multiple locations, and industry watchers say the updated platform will support AI at the edge.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A Vatican Radio territory in north Rome once blamed for electro-smog will become a solar farm
item.description: ROME (AP) — Pope Francis decreed Wednesday that an area of northern Rome, long the source of controversy because of electromagnetic waves emitted by Vatican Radio towers there, will now house a field of solar panels to fuel Vatican City. Citing the Vatican’s pledge in U.N.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Stability AI Seeks New Direction with CEO Hire and Investment Boost from Sean Parker
item.description: After struggling with image generation technology, Stability AI is revamping its strategy under new leadership and securing funding from a group featuring Sean Parker, Facebook's former president, to improve the company's future prospects.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indonesia won't pay an $8 million ransom after a cyberattack compromised the national data center
item.description: JAKARTA, Indonesia (AP) — Indonesia's national data center has been compromised by a hacking group asking for a $8 million ransom that the government says it won't pay.
item.dc:creator: NINIEK KARMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cyberattacks on CDK Global Software Provider Disrupt North American Car Dealerships, Force Shift to Pens and Paper
item.description: A recent cyberattack on CDK Global, a leading provider of software for the auto retail sales sector in North America, has led to widespread disruptions for thousands of dealerships, prompting a temporary shift back to traditional pen-and-paper methods
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: United Nations Urges Big Tech to Combat Online Hate with New Global Principles
item.description: The United Nations has launched new global principles aimed at combating online hate and lies, and is demanding that big tech companies take immediate action to reduce the harm they're causing to individuals and societies worldwide.
item.dc:creator: EDITH M. LEDERER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Music record labels sue AI song-generators Suno and Udio for copyright infringement
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Big record companies are suing artificial intelligence song-generators Suno and Udio for copyright infringement, alleging that the AI music startups are exploiting the recorded works of artists from Chuck Berry to Mariah Carey.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
